data.name: Lewd Island
data.detailed_description:
Get our latest game


Talk to developers on Discord


關於此遊戲



Lewd Island is a unique visual novel that will put your survival skills to the test, uncover secrets, break and form everlasting bonds, while showing you that love wears many faces.

In Lewd Island, you are stranded on a deserted island with a young woman and all you're trying to do is survive. But what if you find more than you bargained for on that island?



Is it possible to find love amongst the wreckage of your fragmented mind?



Lewd Island is full of:
- Secrets to uncover as you try to survive stranded on a island
- Impactful decisions
- Exquisite and often lewd images paired with provocative animations
- Intrigue and betrayal!
- Multiple endings that are shaped by how you play
- And plenty of room for your imagination (and love) to blossom

Check out the latest updates on Lewd Island and our other games on xRed Twitter and Discord!

data.short_description: Lewd Island - a choice driven adult visual novel, located on an abandoned island, where you build your relationship with a fellow survivor using your romantic and survivor skils.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9, OpenGL ES 2 or WebGL
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X Yosemite 10.10
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9, OpenGL ES 2 or WebGL
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9, OpenGL ES 2 or WebGL
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
